titles.title: I Want Be Just Like You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He climbs in my lap for a goodnight hug He calls me Dad and I call him Bub With his faded old pillow, a bear named Pooh He snuggles up close and says, "I want to be like you"

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I tuck him in bed and I kiss him goodnight Trippin' over the toys as I turn out the light I whisper a prayer that someday he'll see He's got a father in God'cause He's seen Jesus in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be just like me Want to be a holy example For his innocent eyes to see Help me be a living Bible, Lord That my little boy can read I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be like me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Got to admit I've got so far to go Make so many mistakes And I'm sure that You know Sometimes it seems no matter how hard I try With all the pressures in life I just can't get it all right

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But I'm trying so hard to learn from the best Being patient and kind, filled With Your tenderness 'Cause I know that he'll learn From the things that he sees And the Jesus he finds Will be the Jesus in me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord, I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be just like me I want to be a holy example For his innocent eyes to see

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Help me be a living Bible, Lord That my little boy can read I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be like me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Right now from where he stands, I may seem mighty tall But it's only'cause I'm learning From the best Father of them all

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Lord, I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be just like me Want to be a holy example For his innocent eyes to see

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Help me be a living Bible, Lord That my little boy can read I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be like me

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: I want to be just like You 'Cause he wants to be like me
